name: pt-tools
description: Personal Claude Code tools: a brand-neutral AI project kickoff process and document style packs.

plugins.name: ai-project-kickoff
plugins.description: Brand-neutral standard process for AI projects: requirements gathering captured as working markdown, with the document package rendered at each gate by the project's chosen style pack (default generic-docx). Includes /new-ai-project, /render-gate-package, the ai-poc-docs skill, discovery and gate-renderer agents, and a design-reviewer agent.

plugins.name: generic-docx
plugins.description: Neutral, unbranded .docx style pack (A4, Arial, neutral palette). The default style pack for ai-project-kickoff.

plugins.name: loop-harness
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic loop-engineering harness: pwsh hooks (session context, deny-list guard, Stop gate on build/verify.ps1), maker/checker/explorer/verifier sub-agents, /init-harness bootstrap, per-stack verify templates.

plugins.name: ai-agent-pack
plugins.description: Build tooling for AI features: build-agent, build-connector, build-mcp-server and write-evals skills, plus a manifest-checker agent. Composes with loop-harness.
